llm_keywords.evidence: |I| ranges from 8.897350992969297e-103 A at V=-0.1 V to 2.3994540300343092e-05 A at V=-6 V, covering about 97.53 decades.

At matched |V| values, magnitudes are close on both branches, for example |I| is 1.7440846641591838e-54 A at -0.2 V and 1.7312649183077767e-54 A at +0.2 V, and 6.92102803659538e-12 A at -1.4 V and 6.928625241384999e-12 A at +1.4 V.

On the positive branch, |I| generally rises from 7.82976992891886e-15 A at 1.0 V to 2.2494143112878067e-05 A at 6.0 V, but adjacent points fluctuate, such as 9.62893587930369e-09 A at 2.25 V followed by 8.279256709853086e-09 A at 2.3 V.

At larger |V|, neighboring values vary non-smoothly; for example on the negative branch |I| changes from 1.2996178367893984e-05 A at -5.55 V to 1.5640525423545973e-05 A at -5.5 V to 1.4597725391442102e-05 A at -5.45 V.
